title: After the Arima Kinen: Long-Awaited Victory

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild over Matikanetannhauser's
win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dedicates her long-awaited victory to the
crowd, and the Arima Kinen comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we leave Nakayama Racecourse, a girl we've
never seen before approaches us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I'm the slowest in my club, and I have no talent,
but I won't let that stop me! I want to do my best,
just like you, Machitan!"
Hearing that, Matikanetannhauser fills with glee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I guess you could say I'm her star," she whispers
as we watch the girl walk off.
